Video.summary: We shorten Cream Puff's frame, show you our short bed options, and then start the new bed assembly.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Video.summary: We build a trans tunnel and wheel tubs in our 72 Super Cheyenne for a lowered stance.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 5: Tunnel Vision

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy get to work restoring the engine bay and front suspension.
Video.title: Cobra Cleanup

Video.summary: Our Mustang Cobra Project Sydewinder gets its aggressive exhaust system.
Video.title: Installing a NASCAR Style Exhaust System on a Foxbody Mustang

Image.alt: Installing a NASCAR Style Exhaust System on a Foxbody Mustang
Installing a NASCAR Style Exhaust System on a Foxbody Mustang
Installing a NASCAR Style Exhaust System on a Foxbody Mustang

Video.summary: Our ’81 Mustang Cobra gets fuel and cooling systems.
Video.title: Installing a Cooling and Fuel System in a Cobra Foxbody

Image.alt: Installing a Cooling and Fuel System in a Cobra Foxbody
Installing a Cooling and Fuel System in a Cobra Foxbody
Installing a Cooling and Fuel System in a Cobra Foxbody

Video.summary: To keep Project Sydewinder on the ground we need a little help.
Video.title: Installing a Mustang Foxbody Wing

Video.summary: We're testing our new C-10 project, putting this old Chevy on a wild ride to plan our custom cruiser upgrades.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Video.summary: We begin teardown of our Chevy C-10 and mockup the new suspension for better handling.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Video.summary: We convert a long bed to short bed and install a rear step notch to drop our C-10
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice
Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice
Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice

Video.summary: We clean up our 1972 C-10 front end with relocated hood hinges and a custom bed frame.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 6: Bed Redefined

Video.summary: Does a ’15 F150 Ford EcoBoost stand a chance against a ’05 Dodge Ram SRT-10?
Video.title: Ford F150 EcoBoost vs Dodge Ram SRT-10: Muscle Trux Build-Off Begins

Image.alt: Ford F150 EcoBoost vs Dodge Ram SRT-10: Muscle Trux Build-Off Begins
Ford F150 EcoBoost vs Dodge Ram SRT-10: Muscle Trux Build-Off Begins
Ford F150 EcoBoost vs Dodge Ram SRT-10: Muscle Trux Build-Off Begins

Video.summary: Dropping it down for better traction, our SRT-10 Ram and EcoBoost F150 get new lowering kits.
Video.title: Ram SRT-10 and F150 Get Lowering Kits: Muscle Trux Build-Off Suspension

Image.alt: Ram SRT-10 and F150 Get Lowering Kits: Muscle Trux Build-Off Suspension
Ram SRT-10 and F150 Get Lowering Kits: Muscle Trux Build-Off Suspension
Ram SRT-10 and F150 Get Lowering Kits: Muscle Trux Build-Off Suspension

Video.summary: When it comes to MOPARs the ’69 Plymouth Roadrunner is iconic.
Video.title: Road Burner

Video.summary: The EBC Fastback Mustang has to hook and stick to the ground.
Video.title: A 50 Year Old Mustang Needs New Suspension Magic

Image.alt: A 50 Year Old Mustang Needs New Suspension Magic
A 50 Year Old Mustang Needs New Suspension Magic
A 50 Year Old Mustang Needs New Suspension Magic

Video.summary: The EBC Fastback Mustang is transformed.
Video.title: Putting the Fast in Fastback/Coyote Transformation

Image.alt: Putting the Fast in Fastback/Coyote Transformation
Putting the Fast in Fastback/Coyote Transformation
Putting the Fast in Fastback/Coyote Transformation

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle crew creates a custom exhaust with some TIG Tech.
Video.title: TIG Exhaust Tech and Mustang Interior Makeover

Image.alt: TIG Exhaust Tech and Mustang Interior Makeover
TIG Exhaust Tech and Mustang Interior Makeover
TIG Exhaust Tech and Mustang Interior Makeover

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle team goes all in to reveal their supercharged pony.
Video.title: ’70 Supercharged Coyote Mustang Goes Full Tilt!

Image.alt: ’70 Supercharged Coyote Mustang Goes Full Tilt!
’70 Supercharged Coyote Mustang Goes Full Tilt!
’70 Supercharged Coyote Mustang Goes Full Tilt!

Video.summary: Learn what to do when looking for an LS engine and how to start it before it goes in your car.
Video.title: LS Engine Swap Shop

Video.summary: Tommy and Joel roll an Hurst Olds into the shop and begin adding thunder back into this classic.
Video.title: Hurst Olds Part 1: Ride The Lightning

Image.alt: Hurst Olds Part 1: Ride The Lightning
Hurst Olds Part 1: Ride The Lightning
Hurst Olds Part 1: Ride The Lightning

Video.summary: We restore a '83 Hurst Olds retro rocket’s finish to a showroom shine.
Video.title: Hurst Olds – Part 02

Video.summary: Grease and gears begin to fly as we swap out our 307 engine for one built in shop of Joe Mondello.
Video.title: Hurst Olds – Part 03

Video.summary: We wire up and cool off our Mondello big-block to take the Hurst's performance from worst to first.
Video.title: Hurst Olds – Part 04

Video.summary: Tommy and Peyton get cracking on a true piece of 90s muscle, their 1990 Mustang.
Video.title: Stumbling Out the Gate

Video.summary: Tommy and Peyton get to work on their 1990 Mustang installing a new front and rear suspension.
Video.title: A Pair of New Horseshoes

Video.summary: It's time to triple the horsepower in our 1990 Mustang! Project Fast Lane Fox Body is getting a new heart.
Video.title: This Horse Has Horsepower

Video.summary: Tommy and Peyton's 1990 Mustang is about to undergo a major transformation with a new widebody kit.
Video.title: A Bit of Plastic Surgery

Video.summary: Tommy and Peyton are set to get their new five-speed transmission into their Fox Body Mustang.
Video.title: Open Heart Surgery

Video.summary: It's all about the looks as Tommy and Peyton start on the interior changes to their 1990 Fox Body Mustang.
Video.title: Saddled Up

Video.summary: It's a blast from the past when project Fast Lane finally sings.
Video.title: The Ice Horse

Video.summary: Eric and Joel unearth the Cummins-crown-jewel dually diesel, a ’93 Dodge Ram W350.
Video.title: Diesel Diamond in the Rough

Video.summary: The guys inject some power into their B-series Cummins with a VE to P pump swap on their 93 Dodge Dually.
Video.title: Pump It Up

Video.summary: We yank out our old suspension, upgrade the underside of our Diesel Dually, and give new disc brakes.
Video.title: Lift & Shift

Video.summary: Our Dodge Dually, Project Nightshift, will shed its skin today as we buzz off all the imperfections.
Video.title: Prime Time Axle Folly

Video.summary: Get your brushes ready because our Dodge Diesel Dually, Nightshift, is turning to the dark side.
Video.title: One-ton, Two-tone Transformation

Video.summary: We lay down the freshly painted back end on our 1993 Dodge W350.
Video.title: Bedtime

Video.summary: '93 Dodge Dually gets rebuilt transfer case, turbo plumbing, and brake line tips.
Video.title: Project Nightshift: Working Overtime

Video.summary: 1993 Dodge Ram Dually gets wiring fixed, seats installed, door panels refurbished, and a maiden voyage.
Video.title: Project Nightshift Putting in Work

Video.summary: We bring back our beloved 1965 Ford flatbed shop truck and drop in a 586 HP FE old-school V8.
Video.title: FErocious Ford Part 1

Video.summary: Our ’65 flatbed gets a modern transmission swap to compliment the Ford FE engine.
Video.title: FErocious Ford Part 2

Video.summary: '89 Chevy Silverado sport truck: shakedown run, dyno test, then stripped to the frame for transformation.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 1 Bare Bones

Video.summary: OBS 632 SS Chevy gets suspension mocked up: spring pocket mods, frame work, c-notch, then powder coat.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 2 Chassis Chaos

Video.summary: Pat & Frankie refresh their 632 BBC for a street rod. New cam, EFI, and more!
Video.title: 632ci EFI BBC Part 1

Video.summary: 632 BBC dyno time! Forged short block, heads, cam, EFI. Max HP tuning!
Video.title: 632ci EFI BBC Part 2

Video.summary: Will the EcoBoost's larger turbos and a high flow exhaust mean bigger improvements?
Video.title: Ram SRT-10 and F150 Get Engine Mods: Muscle Trux Build-Off: Drivetrain

Image.alt: Ram SRT-10 and F150 Get Engine Mods: Muscle Trux Build-Off: Drivetrain
Ram SRT-10 and F150 Get Engine Mods: Muscle Trux Build-Off: Drivetrain
Ram SRT-10 and F150 Get Engine Mods: Muscle Trux Build-Off: Drivetrain

Video.summary: With power taken care off, improvements in the good-looks department include cowl hood and custom wheels.
Video.title: Ram SRT-10 and F150 Exterior Extras: Muscle Trux Build-Off: Button Up

Image.alt: Ram SRT-10 and F150 Exterior Extras: Muscle Trux Build-Off: Button Up
Ram SRT-10 and F150 Exterior Extras: Muscle Trux Build-Off: Button Up
Ram SRT-10 and F150 Exterior Extras: Muscle Trux Build-Off: Button Up

Video.summary: Budgets spent and trucks built, the Ford and Ram go head to head to compare numbers.
Video.title: Ram SRT-10 vs. F150 EcoBoost: Muscle Trux Build-Off Shootout

Ram SRT-10 vs. F150 EcoBoost: Muscle Trux Build-Off Shootout
Ram SRT-10 vs. F150 EcoBoost: Muscle Trux Build-Off Shootout

Video.summary: The Build-Off culminates on the dragstrip and the final tallies are made.
Video.title: Ram SRT-10 vs F150 EcoBoost: Dragstrip Duel

Image.alt: Ram SRT-10 vs F150 EcoBoost: Dragstrip Duel
Ram SRT-10 vs F150 EcoBoost: Dragstrip Duel
Ram SRT-10 vs F150 EcoBoost: Dragstrip Duel

Video.summary: Our retro 1949 Chevy 3100 will end up with a great new look and Chevy's vintage straight six.
Video.title: ClasSix Part 1

Video.summary: Our classic 1949 Chevy 3100 goes under the knife to get a better front suspension that you can build yourself.
Video.title: ClasSix: Part 2

Video.summary: We're installing the drivetrain for Project ClasSix.
Video.title: ClasSix Part 8: Drivetrain Installation

Video.summary: Project: ClasSix gets a stylized interior and a budget exhaust.
Video.title: Project ClasSix Part: 10 - Interior & Exhaust

Video.summary: It's payoff day for Project: ClasSix!
Video.title: ClasSix: Part 11 - Payoff!
